overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling along a desert highway toward the futuristic Night City skyline. The player passes abandoned structures and other vehicles before crashing into an overturned truck, then continues through highway infrastructure toward the urban center.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with abandoned roadside structures

agents.ego_description: cruising along the desert highway following a red vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: red car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: derelict fuel station with collapsed roof and broken signage
sandy desert landscape with scrub brush on both sides of the highway
red sports car driving ahead on the highway
large rocky mesas and cliffs in the distant background
tall metal electrical pylons with multiple power lines running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: Driving along a sun-baked desert highway with abandoned gas station structures visible on the right. Power transmission towers line the left side while the vehicle follows a red sports car toward distant rock formations.

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway and overtaking other vehicles while approaching the city

entered.detail: large elevated pipeline structures running parallel to the highway
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings of Night City visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway as the futuristic Night City skyline grows larger ahead. Industrial pipeline structures line the right side while power towers pass by closely on the left, and the vehicle overtakes several other cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside crash site with overturned vehicle

events.description: vehicle suddenly steers right off the asphalt highway onto dirt terrain
vehicle crashes into the overturned truck and comes to an abrupt stop

agents.ego_description: veering off the road and crashing into an overturned truck before stopping

notable_agents.action: figures standing near the overturned truck wreckage

entered.detail: large truck lying on its side with wheels facing outward, blocking the roadside
truck with yellow and blue biohazard markings parked on the left shoulder
unpaved desert ground with tire tracks and loose sand

segments.scene_description: The vehicle suddenly leaves the highway, crossing onto dirt terrain and crashing into an overturned truck. NPCs are visible near the wreckage as the car impacts and stops briefly beside a biohazard-marked vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with toll gantries and overpasses

events.description: re-entering the paved highway and approaching toll collection infrastructure

agents.ego_description: accelerating back onto the highway and driving through toll gantries toward the city

entered.detail: overhead highway toll collection structure with signage and lights
large concrete highway overpass and bridge structures crossing above the road
large digital billboard displaying advertisements alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: Back on the paved highway, driving through toll gantries and passing under massive concrete overpasses. Large advertising billboards line the right side as the vehicle approaches the towering city skyline, now much closer and more detailed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive from a desolate desert wasteland toward the towering, futuristic skyline of Night City. It begins on a sun-baked highway, passing abandoned gas stations and power transmission towers while following a red sports car toward distant rock formations. As the vehicle accelerates and overtakes other cars, the environment shifts toward an industrial zone characterized by sprawling pipelines and a growing urban silhouette on the horizon. The momentum is suddenly interrupted as the camera veers off the pavement onto dirt terrain, crashing into an overturned truck and a biohazard-marked vehicle surrounded by NPCs. Finally, the vehicle returns to the paved road, gliding through toll gantries and under massive concrete overpasses lined with advertising billboards as the detailed city skyline looms large ahead.
